item.title: Xilinota [Notes]
item.itunes:title: Xilinota [Notes]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Xilinota
(Notes)
Xilinota, an open-source multi-platform note-taking application boasting instant syncing among devices and direct keeping of markdown files. The application runs on Linux, MacOS, Windows, Android and iOS.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Xilinota
(Notes)
Xilinota, an open-source multi-platform note-taking application boasting instant syncing among devices and direct keeping of markdown files. The application runs on Linux, MacOS, Windows, Android and iOS.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Xilinota
(Notes)
Xilinota, an open-source multi-platform note-taking application boasting instant syncing among devices and direct keeping of markdown files. The application runs on Linux, MacOS, Windows, Android and iOS.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: novelWriter [Text Editors]
item.itunes:title: novelWriter [Text Editors]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
novelWriter
(Text Editors)
novelWriter is an open source plain text editor designed for writing novels. It supports a minimal markdown-like syntax for formatting text. It is written with Python 3 (3.8+) and Qt 5 (5.15) for cross-platform support.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
novelWriter
(Text Editors)
novelWriter is an open source plain text editor designed for writing novels. It supports a minimal markdown-like syntax for formatting text. It is written with Python 3 (3.8+) and Qt 5 (5.15) for cross-platform support.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
novelWriter
(Text Editors)
novelWriter is an open source plain text editor designed for writing novels. It supports a minimal markdown-like syntax for formatting text. It is written with Python 3 (3.8+) and Qt 5 (5.15) for cross-platform support.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Spotify-qt [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Spotify-qt [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Spotify-qt
(Audioplayers)
An unofficial Spotify client using Qt as a simpler, lighter alternative to the official client. Please note that you need an actual Spotify client running, for example librespot, which can be configured from within the app.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Spotify-qt
(Audioplayers)
An unofficial Spotify client using Qt as a simpler, lighter alternative to the official client. Please note that you need an actual Spotify client running, for example librespot, which can be configured from within the app.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Spotify-qt
(Audioplayers)
An unofficial Spotify client using Qt as a simpler, lighter alternative to the official client. Please note that you need an actual Spotify client running, for example librespot, which can be configured from within the app.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Beaver Notes [Notes]
item.itunes:title: Beaver Notes [Notes]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Beaver Notes
(Notes)
With Beaver Notes, your notes are securely stored on your device, ensuring complete privacy and control over your data.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:

(Notes)
With Beaver Notes, your notes are securely stored on your device, ensuring complete privacy and control over your data.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

Beaver Notes

item.title: KangarooX kernel for vili [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: KangarooX kernel for vili [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: ktommy91
item.itunes:summary:
KangarooX kernel for vili
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
KangarooX kernel for Xiaomi 11T Pro (vili)
Features:
Latest CLO base
Linux and F2FS upstream merged
Built with Weeb clang 17 with O3, polly and THINLTO optimizations
Debloated base, many tracing, logging, debugging are removed
Exfat,NTFS support
FQ_Codel net scheduler in use
Westwood and BBR TPC algorithms enabled
Wireguard
HBM and Dimlayer support
Updated LZ4,ZSTD and LZ4 zRAM by default
Touchscreen high polling rate support
ssg ioscheduler
KernelSU support
Multi-generational LRU
Many backports for good performance

Credits to:
Divyanshu-Modi, tanz3, chemusqui1, hypeartist, arter97, kerneltoast, Kaz205 and many others

Telegram group: https://t.me/kangarooxvili
[read more]
item.description:
KangarooX kernel for vili
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
KangarooX kernel for Xiaomi 11T Pro (vili)
Features:
Latest CLO base
Linux and F2FS upstream merged
Built with Weeb clang 17 with O3, polly and THINLTO optimizations
Debloated base, many tracing, logging, debugging are removed
Exfat,NTFS support
FQ_Codel net scheduler in use
Westwood and BBR TPC algorithms enabled
Wireguard
HBM and Dimlayer support
Updated LZ4,ZSTD and LZ4 zRAM by default
Touchscreen high polling rate support
ssg ioscheduler
KernelSU support
Multi-generational LRU
Many backports for good performance

Credits to:
Divyanshu-Modi, tanz3, chemusqui1, hypeartist, arter97, kerneltoast, Kaz205 and many others

Telegram group: https://t.me/kangarooxvili
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
KangarooX kernel for vili
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
KangarooX kernel for Xiaomi 11T Pro (vili)
Features:
Latest CLO base
Linux and F2FS upstream merged
Built with Weeb clang 17 with O3, polly and THINLTO optimizations
Debloated base, many tracing, logging, debugging are removed
Exfat,NTFS support
FQ_Codel net scheduler in use
Westwood and BBR TPC algorithms enabled
Wireguard
HBM and Dimlayer support
Updated LZ4,ZSTD and LZ4 zRAM by default
Touchscreen high polling rate support
ssg ioscheduler
KernelSU support
Multi-generational LRU
Many backports for good performance

Credits to:
Divyanshu-Modi, tanz3, chemusqui1, hypeartist, arter97, kerneltoast, Kaz205 and many others

Telegram group: https://t.me/kangarooxvili
[read more]

item.title: Pen Drive Files Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pen Drive Files Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Pen Drive Files Undelete
(Utilities)
www.undelete.co.in recommends easy to operate Pen Drive Files Undelete software to salvage lost, formatted, corrupted and virus infected bootable memory stick all data file in minimal time. Recovery application supports all company storage media and has various inbuilt disk scanning algorithm to retrieve deleted important document without any problem.

[read more]
item.description:
Pen Drive Files Undelete
(Utilities)
www.undelete.co.in recommends easy to operate Pen Drive Files Undelete software to salvage lost, formatted, corrupted and virus infected bootable memory stick all data file in minimal time. Recovery application supports all company storage media and has various inbuilt disk scanning algorithm to retrieve deleted important document without any problem.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Pen Drive Files Undelete
(Utilities)
www.undelete.co.in recommends easy to operate Pen Drive Files Undelete software to salvage lost, formatted, corrupted and virus infected bootable memory stick all data file in minimal time. Recovery application supports all company storage media and has various inbuilt disk scanning algorithm to retrieve deleted important document without any problem.

[read more]
